zh.Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯利德斯 聖 彼得
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Danby於大約1472年出生在英國越可爾法爾利時，他的父親Sir James Danby35歲，母親Agnes Langton17歲。他於1493年11月21日之後與Lady Margaret Scrope結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年11月16日之前在英國越可爾利德斯，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯利德斯 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Danby于大约1472年出生在英国越可爾法爾利时，他的父亲Sir James Danby35岁，母亲Agnes Langton17岁。他于1493年11月21日之后与Lady Margaret Scrope结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年11月16日之前在英国越可爾利德斯，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯利德斯 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Danby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Danby in North Yorkshire, originally named in Old Norse as Danabȳ ‘settlement of the Danes’, and thus cognate with Denby .

variants.name: Denby
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places so named in Yorkshire. A cognate of Danby , ‘settlement of the Danes’, but here the Old Norse first element has been replaced by the cognate Old English Dene.

variants.name: Dansby
meanings: English: presumably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place in an area of Scandinavian settlement; perhaps a variant of   Danby  .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Danby was born about 1472, in Farnley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir James Danby, was 35 and his mother, Agnes Langton, was 17. He married Lady Margaret Scrope after 21 November 1493. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 16 November 1518, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Englan: Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Danby est né environ 1472, à Farnley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Danby, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Langton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Scrope après 21 novembre 1493. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 16 novembre 1518, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher Danby um 1472 in Farnley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Danby 35 und seine Mutter Agnes Langton 17. Er hat nach 21. November 1493 Lady Margaret Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 16. November 1518 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Danby è nato il circa 1472 nel Farnley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir James Danby, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Langton, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Scrope dopo il 21 novembre 1493. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 16 novembre 1518, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Danbyが約1472年にイギリスヨークシュアイアファルンリーで生まれた時，父Sir James Danbyは35歳，母Agnes Langtonは17歳であった。1493年11月21日以後にLady Margaret Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年11月16日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズリーズ スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Danby(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 요르크실르 패른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Danby(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Langton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1493년 11월 21일 이후 Lady Margaret Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 11월 16일 이전 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Englan: Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher Danby nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Farnley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Danby, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Langton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Scrope após 21 de novembro de 1493. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 16 de novembro de 1518, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Englan: лидс ст питир, лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Danby родился около 1472 г. в местности фарнли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James Danby было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Langton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Scrope после 21 ноябрь 1493 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 16 ноябрь 1518 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности лидс ст питир, лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Margaret Scrope después de 21 de noviembre de 1493. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 16 de noviembre de 1518, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
